name: Fried Rice
recipeIngredient: 3-4 cups leftover cooked brown rice (refrigerated overnight)
any other compatible veggies you have in your refrigerator, chopped
soy sauce or tamari to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a LARGE non-stick skillet, sauté the ginger, garlic, onion, mushrooms, and any other veggies that need pre-cooking for about 5 minutes.
2. Transfer the mixture to a bowl.
3. Dry off the bottom of the skillet and return it to heat on medium high.
4. Add the rice and dry fry until some of it turns golden brown.
5. Add back the cooked vegetables, green onions, and peas.
6. Sprinkle with soy sauce or tamari to taste and mix well.
7. Heat thoroughly and enjoy.
